callout_endpoint_change_value: The callout points to one mark. What is the absolute change between that mark and {endpoint_label}?
Use the mark indicated by the callout and the mark labeled {endpoint_label}. What is their absolute value difference?
Read the value at the callout mark and at {endpoint_label}; what is the absolute change?
Compare the callout mark with {endpoint_label}. What is the nonnegative difference between their values?
Using the callout-selected mark and endpoint label {endpoint_label}, compute the absolute change in value.
